overall.description: Two characters sit on a bench in a vibrant cyberpunk city street from Cyberpunk 2077. One character smokes and uses a handheld device while pedestrians walk by and futuristic vehicles pass on the road. The scene features bright sunlight, neon billboards including a prominent 'TENGU' sign, and modern glass architecture. One companion leaves and another arrives as the camera shifts from a rear view to a side profile perspective.

agents.ego_description: sitting on bench smoking a cigarette and looking at a handheld device

notable_agents.action: companion character with dreadlocks sitting on bench, stands up and prepares to leave at end of segment

entered.detail: red and gray concrete seating where characters are sitting
small turquoise futuristic vehicle parked across the street
large pink neon sign with Japanese characters on building rooftop
multi-story white art deco style building with signage
tall modern glass and steel towers in the background
green leafy trees lining the street median
silver metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Two characters sit on a concrete bench facing a busy cyberpunk street. The mohawked character smokes and checks a device while their companion sits beside them. A teal compact car is parked across the street, and the pink TENGU neon sign glows in the background. Pedestrians walk by and traffic moves along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street bench with expanded right side view

events.description: new pedestrian arrives and sits on the right end of the bench

agents.ego_description: continues smoking and using phone while seated alone on bench

notable_agents.action: new character with red cap and dark clothing sits down on bench

entered.detail: tall building covered in large digital advertisements and neon displays

segments.scene_description: The camera pans slightly right as the companion with dreadlocks leaves. A new character wearing a red cap arrives and sits on the right end of the bench. The view shifts to show more of the colorful billboard-covered buildings on the right side of the street while the teal car remains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street bench viewed from side angle

events.description: camera begins moving to side view of seated character

agents.ego_description: puts away phone, looks around the street, and adjusts sitting position

notable_agents.action: character with red cap remains seated, looking at own device

entered.detail: green and white futuristic vending machine or kiosk structure

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around to the left side of the mohawk character, revealing a green vending machine structure and the character's American flag jacket patch. The character puts away their phone and looks around while the red-capped companion remains seated to the right. The perspective shifts from rear to side profile as the camera movement completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a rear view of two companions on a city bench to a side profile perspective amidst a vibrant cyberpunk street. It begins with a mohawked character smoking and checking a device beside a companion, while a teal compact car and a glowing pink TENGU sign anchor the busy urban backdrop. As the camera pans slightly right, the companion with dreadlocks departs and is replaced by a new character in a red cap, expanding the view to reveal more colorful billboard-covered buildings. The scene then orbits around to the left, passing a green vending machine and highlighting an American flag patch on the mohawked character's jacket. Finally, the camera completes its movement as the character puts away their phone and looks around, settling into a side profile view of the pair.
